specimen.role: canonical Steam BEA.exe selected through the AppCore executable override resolver

observer.timingEndpoints: first observed raw state 1 through first observed raw state 3
observer.debuggerBoundary: one-shot input/Morph/state-write markers detached before raw state 1; debugger stops were not timing endpoints

numericStates.0: morphing from jet toward walker (Steam Morph write; not runtime-timed here)
numericStates.1: walker-to-jet transition (Steam Morph write and repeated copied-runtime observation)
numericStates.2: walker (control and modified baseline; Steam flight-disabled rejection gate)
numericStates.3: jet (repeated stable state after raw state 1)

events: player one received Transform action 0x21 in raw state 2

coreMapping.stateOwnership: Core remains Walker with explicit WalkerToJet transition state, then commits Jet after 16 intervals

nonclaims: Not visual animation or camera-settle timing.
Not retail energy, shield, movement, weapon, or flight-dynamics parity.
The retired 4.67-5.17 second observation did not use the identified raw state-1 to state-3 endpoints and is not a Core duration.
